episodes.title: Bipartisan group of lawmakers urge King Charles to meet with Epstein survivors
episodes.description:
A bipartisan group of lawmakers requested King Charles meet with survivors and relatives of victims of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. But Charles' team says he will not be holding such a meeting.
